review_title: Best AI copy tool we've tried
description: Writing content was always a pain for us and it would take us days to produce a single product page. Mainly because we would go back and forth with the text and we felt like we never nailed the idea. With Copysmith we can get several pieces in content in a matter of seconds, which allows us to chose the best one or, what we usually do, mix & match using bits of different results. We can now produce a whole product page in an hour or so.
author: Leni N.
pros: Compared to other tools we tested, Copysmith is hands the down the best content quality. The many available templates are very convenient. We are able to get from a very rough idea to a well written piece of content in a matter of minutes.
cons: Copysmith's interface is less than ideal. There are other tools out there that look nicer and have a more intuitive interface. We decided to stick with Copysmith in spite of that because the end result is just so much better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I had a great experience and would have bought the LTD but it was a little pricey for only 25credits when there are others out there that are 10 or 20 dollars cheaper have more credits and do the same things.
author: Richard L.
pros: Copysmith is a content generator using open AI GPT3 I have used and tried almost all of the various products released in the last few months. Copysmith was different in that it has a chrome ext. and had great tutorials and direction. It wrote pretty decent ads and titles and saved a bunch of time for writing seo adds and blog posts.
cons: The copy was good but not great and needed to be edited for punctuation.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: CopySmith - An AI Generation Tool with Low Limits
description: AI generation tools are not meant to replace creative writing. It is intended to complement it. As for the content generated, I think Copysmith.ai did an admirable job. Limitations and slightly higher pricing are the only negative aspects.
author: Zach K.
pros: CopySmith is comparable to other content generation tools in terms of the different content types.
cons: There are a few plans available starting with the Starter plan at $19/mth to the Teams plan at $118/mth. Comparing to other similar products, CopySmith pricing plans are on the high side. Furthermore, the Starter plan only provides 50 credits per month. Although it mentioned that with 50 credits, one can generate 650 pieces of copies on average, however for heavy use, one can definitely burn that credits in matter of days, especially for digital marketers writing product descriptions, ad copies on multiple channels like Facebook, Google Ads and content marketers.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: CopySmith: An Affordable Solution For Content Creators Of All Sizes and Volume
description: Copysmith is a great solution to get work done more efficiently. Since I work with various types of content (from blog posts to technical website copies), it is a great solution to many different types of projects. It is also a great tool to use to generate ideas for content and help me create projects more efficiently for my content needs.
author: Mark C.
pros: I like the fact that it is one of the most affordable solutions. It also has great options for creating content for different needs, such as blog posts, product descriptions and website copies. It also has a new free-form editor that I am currently trying, which is a feature that I like with these types of software solutions. It makes it easier to create my copy without the need to have other documents. In addition, the organization of the files and projects is great.
cons: When I first visited the website, I found it difficult to navigate and find the tools I need. I think there are still some tools that I may have missed. But, for the price and the quality of the results you get, it is worth taking the time to figure out where everything is and learn the software. If you are working with a team, there might be some training that needs to be done to get everybody on the right page.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: There's not much that I can say that is negative about Copysmith. The produce is clearly advertised as a service to assist content creators and marketers, and that's exactly what it does. I would like to see some features related to filtering results, pulling content generated from one template into another, and more templates. Overall, I'm very satisfied with this service. The pricing is fair for the features they offer, and their platform is simple and easy to use. I also like how involved they try to be within their community of customers. They listen to users and are aware of flaws within their system. Using a service from a company that knows there are things to improve to increase overall user satisfaction, while still offering a great produce, gives me high hopes for the future releases of Copysmith.
author: Justin A.
pros: The product is extremely straightforward to use. There are resources for helping a new user get familiar with the software and how to make the most of what you get. Copysmith is very upfront about their service being a tool to assist with marketing activities, and that it's not the be-all-end-all to content creation. There's a large selection of templates to use, and each one serves a different purpose within the entire process. You get as much out as you put in, but most of the suggestions I'm given can be used with minor editing or can serve as a starting point to help me generate ideas. On top of that, their customer service team is great. It's clear that the company is trying to create a tool that provides a huge benefit to marketers and takes feedback routinely and genuinely.
cons: It is sometimes finicky to use. Content that is generated has to be tweaked occasionally and ran through multiple iterations to get a result I'm satisfied with, but I believe it is due to the industry I am in. I will also sometimes get generated blog content that starts out as one topic, but upon moving through the Copysmith process somehow shifts into a different topic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I like the UX and UI. It also has so many templates compared to Writesonic. Their Facebook community is also great where the devs are very active in the discussion. However, I'm disappointed by the quality of their blog post writer. Other than that, the quality is quite good.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like the fact that Copysmith has so many templates to begin with. They have a Content rewriter, product description, AIDA framework, USP, Facebook ads templates, and many others, just to name a few. Some of the templates generate a usable and decent result that I can use right away without further editing.
cons: The blog post writer quality is very poor compared to Writesonic. The article generated does not make any sense at all and not usable by any measure. They already overhauled the blog post workflow so I hope the quality gets improved. The usage of the credits is also not generous.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Copysmith is an AI-powered writing assistant that uses GPT-3 technology. It is a process where AI and deep learning are used to process language naturally and help machines produce content that looks like humans write it. With the popularity of AI writing tools in the industry, many companies are emerging with their features and benefits. Copysmith is a similar tool but has a lot more features and integrations than its competitors. Besides creating content for your online store and ads, you can also build custom campaigns with this tool. You can even optimize the SEO of your content and embellish your Shopify store with excellent content using this tool. With Chrome and other extensions, you can easily use this AI tool anywhere. Different pricing plans are available in this tool, so you can choose the right plan according to your needs and budget. And team collaboration becomes very easy with this magnificent tool.
author: Md Faiyjul Kabir R.
pros: • Copysmith is equipped with a powerful natural language processing system called GPT-3, which allows it to produce human-like text that is extremely important in writing product descriptions. • Not only product descriptions, Copysmith will also create blog content for you. It is really helpful when you want to create a blog to market your products. • Optimizing content is very easy with this tool. You can optimize or rewrite content in Copysmith. • The tool offers more than 35 readymade templates. If you are a complete beginner, you can choose any template and start working right away.
cons: • Custom templates aren’t available in the Starter plan, and API isn’t available in both Starter and Professional plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A master copysmith with an awesome team!
description: It's helping me with creating my online articles which would have normally taken me weeks for just one and now I can create the foundation of my article and tweak it to be more personable. Thanks Copysmith!
author: JP M.
pros: The team at Copysmith.ai are always upgrading this product based on user feedback and team insights that we didn't even this of! Constant improvements keep them ahead of all other AI Writers. The content it produces is B+ to A- (nothing is perfect) using a multitude templates that just keep growing.
cons: Originally, I thought the price was a little high, but I saw something special with CopySmith.ai. Thank goodness I joined the Early Adopter program, because recent events just solidified me as a long term customer (See "GPT-3 Tech Startup Copysmith Secures $10 Million in Funding" - https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20210421005680/en/GPT-3-Tech-Startup-Copysmith-Secures-10-Million-in-Funding)
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It's been great. I especially like the Chrome extension that lets me grab information and write on the fly. The UI / UX is great and doesn't feel restrictive. Once you learn the basics it's easy to navigate and start writing your first piece.
author: Ryan D.
pros: It's fast! I can use a variety of tools to get the ideas flowing, then expand upon them to create whatever content length I need.
cons: I would like to see a tutorial come with Copysmith. It was a challenge trying to figure out how to use the software at first. I set up a meeting with one of the CS staffers and they took the time to walk me through it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good quality AI copy tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Copysmith is a good-quality copy tool that can generate content in a matter of seconds. The overall content is of decent quality as compared to other AI tools. It can help you generate blogs, ads and some branding options. But if you want to use this tool for writing product reviews, it would be better to try some other tool.
cons: Overall quality is good but it creates some irrelevant content in long-form-blog-generation. You have to spend time editing the long-form content.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Veronica T.
pros: The software is easy to use as the interface is user friendly. The language of Copysmith is quite naturale and it really helps to speed your writing. I recommend it especially for content writers that have to do a lot of work by themselves and might run out of ideas
cons: I would like to have more plagiarism checks
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I use it every day. It helps me make all the copy I need for my website and it is awesome. New
author: pedro I.
pros: The awesome platform is an incredibly useful tool for me. I use it every day and love it. I make all my ads with it. The platform has helped me to build my entire website and is awesome.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Copysmith Review: Is it Worth the Money
description: This copywriting software is excellent. Your copywriting process will be expedited, and you'll have access to a large variety of templates. However, when it comes to lengthy blog entries, this tool shouldn't be utilised in place of actual writing.
author: Nadeem M.
pros: Convenient and easy to use Simple user interface Backs up content for you Optimized content for SEO Tool constantly updates to be more effective Affordable pricing in most cases Time-saving functionality Good customer support Easy content exporting
cons: Credits do expire Suitable for short content needs
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: We are saving time, content creation is a big thing in our agency and copysmith helped us achieve our content goals and work faster.
author: Masego H.
pros: Easy to use, quick and we could focus on other things as content creation and management takes a lot of our time.
cons: Copysmith is amazing, there are no features that are needed, it does well in comparison with the competition, it was easy for our company to use the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: If you're looking for a way to save time and money, look no further than copysmith. This tool is perfect for anyone who needs help with copywriting - whether it be Facebook ads, emails, websites, landing pages or blogs. It's affordable (the monthly cost will depend on usage) and effortless to use!
author: Travanti J.
pros: I like the interface and it outputs some quality text.
cons: Some features other companies have are missing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It helps me write quick, snappy Facebook/Instagram posts for my clients which is great for getting out of writer's block and saving time
author: Tariq Z.
pros: I use Copysmith primarily for making social media captions. I like being able to type in a few keywords and produce social media posts that read really well
cons: No cons but there are more competent alternatives to this tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great software to aid in copywriting
author: Pedro M.
pros: It's extremely easy to use. The fact that you can create a project and use one description to generate all pieces of copy is an advantage and a time saver compared with the competitors I've tried.
cons: There are some slight bugs from time to time but the support team is quick to reply and the dev team actually fixes them quickly.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Emilia W.
pros: Great for rewriting captions for various channels
cons: Dashboard interface could use some work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Copysmith - A support to your content management workflow
description: Love the tool and use it regularly
author: anita E.
pros: Love the content rewriter option, blog kickstarter and content enhancer options
cons: Could offer more features for the pricing
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Very good! I had a slight issue after we started our subscription but customer service fixed it right away.
author: Stephanie S.
pros: I like the content is spits out at warp speed. It gives me good starting points to expand and grow the content we use on our website, email marketing and ads.
cons: Sometimes it spits out some off the wall things that make no sense. I have tried using the blog writer and it doesn't give the best content but it gives me a good starting point to get an article written faster than if I was going it from scratch on my own.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tom K.
pros: The software is easy to use and provides us with quick results. We can get started on a project and use Copysmith to move the project along quickly.
cons: There are times when the copy solutions don't match up correctly with what we are writing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I t helps me a lot with product descriptions and content. Glad I found the product
